sections.sectionTitle: Upate Mai-ah Peter leh Johan Kipaipih

verses.text: Peter leh Johan omkhawmin, tua bangin Peter in mite kiangah thu a gen laitakin siampite, biakinn upate, leh Saddusi mite hong pai uh hi
Hih sawltak nihte in misite thokik ding hi, cih a lahtelna dingun sihna panin Jesuh thokik hi, ci-in mite kiangah thu hilh uh ahih manin nawngkai a sa uh hi
Tua ahih manin amaute gel man uh a, ni tum kuanta ahih manin a zing ciangdong thong sungah a khum uh hi
Ahi zongin amaute' thugen a za mi tampi in um uh a, thu um mi tul nga bang a pha ta uh hi
A zing ciangin Jew mi makaite, upate, leh Thukham hilh siate, Jerusalem-ah hong kikhawm uh hi
Siampi lianpen a semngei Annas, siampi lianpen a sem Kaiafas, Johan, Alexander, leh siampi lianpente beh mi khempeuh tawh kikhopna khat a bawl uh hi
Amaute' mai-ah sawltakte gel dingsak uh a, “Kua' vangliatna leh kua' min tawh hih bangin na sem na hi uh hiam?” ci-in a dong uh hi
Tua ciangin Kha Siangtho tawh kidimin Peter in dawng a, “Makaite leh upate aw
hih khebai mipa tungah thuhoih a kibawlna leh ama damna thu tawh kisai-in kote thu hong sit na hih uh leh

note in singlamteh tungah na thah uh, Pasian in sihna panin a thawhkiksak Nazareth khuami Jesuh Khrih min vangliatna tawh hih mipa a ci damin hih lai-ah ding ahihna thu, note leh Israel mi khempeuh in na theih dingun a kilawm thu khat ahi hi
Lai Siangtho in, ‘No innlamte in na nilkhiat uh suangtum pen innkiu suang bulpi a suak hi,’ ci-in a gen pen hih Jesuh ahi hi
Ama hang bek tawh hotkhiatna kingah thei ding hi. Bang hang hiam cih leh eite in hotkhiatna i ngahtheihna dingin leitung khempeuhah Pasian in hong piak min dang khat zong omlo hi,” ci-in a gen hi

Uliante in Peter leh Johan a han' mahmahna thu leh amaute pilna sang a neilo mi mawkmawk ahihna thu a theih uh ciangin lamdang a sa mahmah uh hi. Tua ciangin Jesuh tawh a kikhawl khin ngeite ahihna uh a phawk uh hi
Ahi zongin a kidamsak mipa pen Peter leh Johan-te gei-ah om gige ahih manin a nialna ding uh thu mu zolo uh hi
Tua ahih manin tua innsung panin amaute pusuaksak phot uh a, tua khit ciangin amaute thu kikumin
“Hih mite bangcih ding ihi hiam? Jerusalem khuasunga om mi khempeuh in hih mite' bawl a lamdang mahmah nate thei ciat uh a, i nial theihna ding bangmah omlo hi
Ahi zongin mite lakah hih thute a kitheihthang thuahlohna dingin, Jesuh' min tawh kuama kiangah thu a gen ngei nawnlohna dingun taii ni,” a kici uh hi
Tua ciangin sawltakte samkik uh a, Jesuh' min tawh thugen ahi a, thuhilh ahi zongin a hih nawn hetlohna dingun thu a pia uh hi
Ahi zongin Peter leh Johan in, “Note' thu man'zawk ding leh Pasian' thu man'zawk ding, Pasian' muhna panin koi pen manzaw ding cih thu nomau mah in zong ngaihsun ciat un
Tua ahih manin kote in ka muhsa uh leh ka zaksa uh thute genloin ka om thei kei ding uh hi,” ci-in a dawng uh hi
Ahi zongin uliante in a khauhzaw-in thu a gen khit uh ciangin a khah uh hi. Hih thupiang hangin mi khempeuh in Pasian phat uh ahih manin hih mite gim a piakna ding uh a thu mu theilo uh hi
Bang hang hiam cih leh hih na lamdang a kibawlna mipa pen a khan' kum sawmli val a pha khinsa mi khat ahi hi.

sections.sectionTitle: Thu Umte in Han'na ding Thu Ngen

verses.text: Peter leh Johan a kikhahkhiat khit phetin a lawmte uh kiangah pai-in siampi liante leh upate in amaute tungah a thugente khempeuh a zasak uh hi
A lawmte un hih thu a zak uh ciangin a vekpi-un lungsim kikhatin Pasian' kiangah thu ngen uh a, “Van leh lei, tuipi tuineu leh a sunga om khempeuh a piangsak Topa aw
kote' pupi, na nasempa David tungah na Kha Siangtho tawh thu na gen a, amah in, ‘Bang hangin Gentail mite heh mahmah a, a tangtunglo dingpi vaihawm uh ahi hiam
Topa leh ama Khrih a do dingin leitung kumpite kithawi uh a, gam ukte kikaikhawm uh hi,’ ci hi

A cih mah bangin Herod leh Pontias Pilat in hih khuapi sung teek mahah Gentail mite leh Israel mite tawh kikupna nei uh a, nangmah in Khrih dingin na bawl, a siangtho na Nasempa Jesuh thahdingin a vaihawm uh hi
Nangmah in na deihna bangin a piangdingin na vangliatna tawh na khensatsa thu khempeuh a semdingin amaute kikhawm uh hi
Tua ahih ciangin Topa aw, amaute in kote hong tawn'nate thei in la, nangma nasem kote in lungsim han' mahmahna tawh nangma thu ka gentheihna dingun hong huh in
Cinate damsak theihna ding vangliatna hong pia in la, a siangtho na Nasempa Jesuh' min tawh na lamdang kibawl ta hen,” a ci uh hi
Tua bangin thu a nget khit uh ciangin amaute' kikhopna mun hong kilinggawp hi. Amaute khempeuh Kha Siangtho tawh kidim uh a, hang takin Pasian' thu gen ding a kipan uh hi.
Thu um mi khempeuh a lungsim uh leh a ngaihsutna uh kikhat uh a, kuamah in ama neihsa kei-a' tuam ciloin, a neih khempeuh uh a neikhawm ciat uh hi
Topa Jesuh' thawhkikna thu, sawltakte in vangliatna tawh teci pang uh a, Pasian in amaute khempeuh tungah thupha tampi a pia hi

Inn ahi a, lo ahi zongin a neite in zuak uh a, a sum ngahte uh sawltakte kiangah a ap uh hi. Mi khempeuh tungah a kisapna bang ciatun a sumte hawm uh ahih manin amaute lakah sum kitangsam kuamah omlo uh hi
Tua hi a, Saipras tuikulh-a suak, Levi mi Josef, sawltakte in Barnabas (Hanthawn Siampa a cihnopna) min a phuahpa in
ama neih a lo zuak a, a sum hong paipihin sawltakte khutsungah a ap hi.
